generated_oml:
namespace DTDFVocab = "http://www.example.org/DTDFVocab"
instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving paths, and detected object tracks"
]
instance DataSavingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Saving sensor and vehicle data for later analysis",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance ReportGenerationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generating detailed reports from collected data"
]
instance LeadVehicleDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detecting lead vehicles for Adaptive Cruise Control"
]
instance SpeedComputationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Computing desired speed based on distance to lead vehicle"
]
instance ActuationCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generating motor voltage commands for speed control",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance EnableAccAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enabling or disabling ACC system remotely",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Setting desired speed for ACC system",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Issuing emergency braking commands remotely",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance TroubleshootingDataCollectionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Collecting data for developer troubleshooting",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data Monitoring service featuring real-time visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving paths, detected object tracks, data saving, and report generation capabilities",
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight, DataSavingAction, ReportGenerationInsight
]
instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computation Offloading service where ACC system's lead vehicle detection, speed computation based on distance, and actuation commands are offloaded from vehicle's ECUs to cloud resources",
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetectionInsight, SpeedComputationInsight, ActuationCommandAction
]
instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote Management service enabling operators to remotely enable/disable ACC, set desired speeds, and issue emergency braking commands, while developers utilize data collection for troubleshooting",
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableAccAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction, TroubleshootingDataCollectionAction
]
instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data Translation component for serializing data, aligning message types, and performing unit conversions",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]
instance DataPreProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data Pre-Processing component for point cloud clustering and object tracking",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]
instance Jetpack50SdkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration",
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService, DataMonitoringService
]
instance Ros2MiddlewareEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 (ROS2) middleware for inter-component communication",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]
instance Python38Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for application modules implementation",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataPreProcessingEnabler, DataTranslationEnabler
]
instance CppEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for application modules implementation",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataPreProcessingEnabler, DataTranslationEnabler
]
instance MatlabSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for application modules implementation",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataPreProcessingEnabler
]
instance SqlDatabaseEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for structured data storage and reporting",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]
instance HokuyoUst10LxLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor for collecting point cloud data on detected objects in the vehicle's proximity"
]
instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel RealSense D435i Depth Camera for collecting proximity object data"
]
instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller converting desired speed into motor voltage commands"
]
instance LowerChassis : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lower level chassis responsible for controlling steering and speed"
]
instance UpperChassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Upper level chassis for mounting sensors and computing hardware"
]
instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUst10LxLiDAR
]
instance DepthCameraDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]
instance LiDARRawData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data collected from vehicle's surroundings",
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler, DataPreProcessingEnabler
]
instance DepthCameraRawData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw depth camera data for proximity object detection",
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler, DataPreProcessingEnabler
]
instance PointCloudClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for clustering point cloud data to identify objects",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingEnabler
]
instance ObjectTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingEnabler
]
instance DataCollectingFe : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Data Collecting Front-End for collecting raw point cloud data, vehicle state parameters, motor actuation signals, and steering servo positions via Wi-Fi UDP"
]
instance DataPreProcessingFe : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Data Pre-Processing Front-End for processing point cloud data through clustering and tracking algorithms"
]
instance ThreeDVisualizationFe : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D Visualization subcomponent of User Interface Front-End for real-time visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving paths, and detected object tracks"
]
instance ControlPanelFe : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Control Panel subcomponent of User Interface Front-End for remote enable/disable ACC, set desired speeds, and issue emergency braking commands"
]
instance PhysicalTwinEntityEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains HokuyoUst10LxLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, VedderElectronicSpeedController, LowerChassis, UpperChassis
]
instance DigitalTwinEntityEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains DataCollectingFe, DataPreProcessingFe, ThreeDVisualizationFe, ControlPanelFe
]
instance UserEntityEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains ThreeDVisualizationFe, ControlPanelFe
]
instance SystemUnderStudy : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment PhysicalTwinEntityEnvironment, DigitalTwinEntityEnvironment, UserEntityEnvironment
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands for motor actuation and steering servo operations are generated by the ACC Controlling FE, serialized by the Data Translation component, and transmitted via ROS2 network to the Actuation FE. Specific details on command validation, authentication, feedback mechanisms, and execution confirmation are not provided in the document."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Synchronization accuracy of 100 ms is required for coordination between devices and computation offloading due to hardware limitations, whereas safety-critical vehicular standards mandate stricter synchronization (i.e., <100 ms)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system's orchestration follows ISO 23247 RA, organizing components into Physical Twin Entity (handling resource-specific and general automotive functions like Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking), Digital Twin Entity (data management and control), and User Entity (3D Visualization and Control Panel). Each entity is deployed on dedicated hardware, with FEs implemented as ROS2 packages. The Physical Twin Entity's design diverges from ISO 23247 by encompassing inherent system resources rather than only resource-specific functionality, affecting functionality ownership and engineering processes."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components occurs over a ROS2 network, while inter-entity communication uses Wi-Fi with UDP transport layer protocol. Network topology, bandwidth requirements, latency constraints, reliability mechanisms, redundancy configurations, and security protocols are not specified in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247:2021 standard, Part 2 (Reference Architecture), defining an entity-based structure comprising Observable Manufacturing Elements (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. Functional Entities (FEs) implement specific tasks such as actuation, data transformation, and user interfacing, with implementation examples including OPC Unified Architecture (OPC UA) for data collection and device control."
]
